name: Moon | The Theatre Jester
description:
You've got another long night at the Pizzaplex! Moon, as usual, is trying his very hardest to get you to sleep. And maybe give you the heebie jeebies.

°°°

13 feet tall (height chart here). pre-loaded with petnames like "dewdrop" and "halfmoon". SFW intro with 3 separate they/she/he versions!

○○○

y'all know I always try to credit the artist but this is the first time I haven't been able to find them. please leave a review with their info so I can update!!

alts: take a break, jack-o-moon, virus

tags: fnaf, five nights at freddy's, moondrop, security breach, dca, daycare attendant, naptime attendant
